case_title: BIBBENS, SAMUEL VS GREYHOUND LINES INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-01-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-08-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR DEFENDANT TO BRING ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTATION.
COPY PROVIDED TO THE COURT OF CORRESPONDENCE FROM GREYHOUND BUS LINES, DEFT TO SAMUEL BIBBENS, PLTF W/ COPIES OF PAYMNT CHECKS TOTAL AMT - $2,100.00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIBBENS, SAMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREYHOUND LINES INC. $2,100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,100.00, IF PLAINTIFF HAS RECEIVED SOME COMPENSATION FROM DEFENDANT'S CLAIM PROCESS, THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE REDUCED BY THAT AMOUNT.
